summary: Case-insensitive pattern matching successfully implemented using character classes.

implementationReview.approach: Uses character classes [Cc][Oo]-[Aa][Uu][Tt][Hh][Oo][Rr][Ee][Dd]-[Bb][Yy] for case-insensitive matching. This is portable across sed implementations unlike the 'I' flag which is GNU-specific.

requirements: Pattern matches 'co-authored-by' regardless of letter casing
fulfillmentCheck.notes: Character class approach ensures all case variations (Co-Authored-By, co-authored-by, CO-AUTHORED-BY, etc.) are matched.
